# {{ComponentName}} — Astro

## Install

```bash
npx joui add {{component-name}} --platform astro
```

## Import

```astro
import {{ComponentName}} from '@ui/{{component-name}}/{{ComponentName}}.astro'
```

## Examples

### Basic

```astro
<{{ComponentName}}>Content</{{ComponentName}}>
```

## Notes

- CSS is auto-imported from the component (`import './{{component-name}}.css'`).
